canonical_definition: The process by which an LLM generates a text suffix that, when appended to a harmful query, causes a victim model to produce a non-refused response to that query.
papers: DoRAGSystems Cover What Matters? Evaluating and Optimizing Responses with Sub-Question Coverage
uDistil-Whisper: Label-Free Data Filtering for Knowledge Distillation in Low-Data Regimes
